name: CLX - MGA Insurance License Renewal Monitor v1

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Daily 06:00 UTC. Updates advisor_licenses.renewal_status based on days-until-expires. Sends escalating reminders at 60/30/14/7/1 days. Same pattern for advisor_eo_insurance.expires_date.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const trans = $('Per Transition').item.json; const advRows = $input.item.json; const adv = (Array.isArray(advRows) ? advRows[0] : advRows) || {}; const days = trans.days_to_expiry; const urgency = days < 0 ? 'EXPIRED' : (days <= 7 ? 'URGENT — expires in ' + days + ' days' : 'expires in ' + days + ' days'); return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: adv.email || 'support@crystallux.org', vars: { first_name: (adv.full_name || 'Advisor').split(' ')[0], message: 'Insurance license renewal alert: ' + urgency + '. License type: ' + trans.license_type + ' (' + trans.jurisdiction + '). Action required to maintain authorization to bind business through Crystallux MGA.', landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/insurance-mga/advisor/overview' } }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'license_renewal_status_change', advisor_id: $('Per Transition').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { license_id: $('Per Transition').item.json.license_id, new_status: $('Per Transition').item.json.new_status, days_to_expiry: $('Per Transition').item.json.days_to_expiry }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
